subject: Dearest
body:
I think about you all the time, every day and wish I could make things
better.

You've given me a very good and happy life!

My current boss was in jail 10 years ago for an economic crime in Finland
(everyone in Dubai has a shady past). He told me he went to jail in a
Learjet and 18 months later left jail in a Learjet.

I always carry you in my heart wherever I go.

-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
body_html:
I think about you all the time, every day and wish I could make things better.
 
You've given me a very good and happy life!
 
My current boss was in jail 10 years ago for an economic crime in Finland (everyone in Dubai has a shady past). He told me he went to jail in a Learjet and 18 months later left jail in a Learjet.
 
I always carry you in my heart wherever I go.

Cecilia Steen
